ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report type */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reported variable */,
  "national_count" INTEGER /* Count of specimens/numbers at the national level */,
  "bomi_county" INTEGER /* Count for Bomi County */,
  "bong_county" INTEGER /* Count for Bong County */,
  "grand_kru" INTEGER /* Count for Grand Kru */,
  "lofa_county" INTEGER /* Count for Lofa County */,
  "margibi_county" INTEGER /* Count for Margibi County */,
  "maryland_county" INTEGER /* Count for Maryland County */,
  "montserrado_county" INTEGER /* Count for Montserrado County */,
  "nimba_county" INTEGER /* Count for Nimba County */,
  "river_gee_county" INTEGER /* Count for River Gee County */,
  "river_cess_county" INTEGER /* Count for River Cess County */,
  "sinoe_county" INTEGER /* Count for Sinoe County */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for report creation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the report */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for report update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_reports_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_reports_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the county belongs */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., Specimens collected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the variable (e.g., disease, specimen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated report */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Total number of results processed */,
  "positive_count" INTEGER /* Number of positive test results */,
  "negative_count" INTEGER /* Number of negative test results */,
  "pending_count" INTEGER /* Number of results pending */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test performed (e.g., PCR, Rapid Test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated report */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of reported deaths */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date of reporting the deaths */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of report generation (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* User who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., create, update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the affected report */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES health_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report status entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_status_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES health_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_types" (
  "specimen_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen type */,
  "specimen_name" TEXT /* Name of the specimen type (e.g., blood, tissue) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specimen type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen collection record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated report */,
  "specimen_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen type */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was collected */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of specimens collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_collection_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES health_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_collection_specimen_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_type_id") REFERENCES specimen_types ("specimen_type_id")
)
